attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM, 
WDP.BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT, 
WDP.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD, 
WDP.PROMOTION_BUNDLE_FLG, 
WDP.PROMOTION_CATEGORY_TYPE_CD, 
WDP.SOURCE_CREATED_BY_DTM, 
WDP.SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM, 
WDP.CREATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER, 
WDP.UPDATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER, 
WDP.PROMOTION_PRICE_LIST_TYPE_CD, 
WDP.MAXIMUM_ALLOWABLE_DEAL_AMT, 
WDP.PROMOTION_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, 
WDP.REPORTED_PROMOTION_THEATRE_CD, 
WDP.PROMOTION_EFFECTIVE_END_DT, 
WDP.MAX_DAYS_ALLWD_PRMTN_CLAIM_CNT, 
WDP.PROMOTION_SOURCE_NAME, 
WDP.PROMOTION_SHORT_DESCR, 
WDP.PROMOTION_NAME, 
WDP.STANDARD_BULLETIN_NUM, 
WDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT, 
WDP.PROMOTION_INITIATOR_NAME, 
WDP.PRMTN_APRVD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
WDP.SRC_RPTD_PROMOTION_APPRVR_NAME, 
WDP.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, 
WDP.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
WDP.BK_DEAL_ID, 
WDP.WHOLESALE_PRICE_LIST_NAME, 
WDP.GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_NAME, 
WDP.PROD_FMLY_PRMTN_PRC_LIST_NAME, 
WDP.CHNL_ACCT_MGR_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
WDP.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WDP.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WDP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WDP.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
PROMOTION_SPLIT_FLG,
MARKET_TYPE_CD,
CHANNEL_TYPE_CD 
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION WDP
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
WHERE NDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM=WDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM
AND NDP.BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT=WDP.BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT
AND NDP.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD=WDP.BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD)
